name: Sixth Sense
description:
Clairsentience wild talent (psionic cantrip). Casting Time: 1 bonus action; Range: Self; Components: None; Duration: Focus.

You gain a prescient sense that improves your reflexive response to danger, granting you advantage on initiative rolls until your focus ends.

effects.name: Sixth Sense
effects.description: You gain a prescient sense that improves your reflexive response to danger, granting you advantage on initiative rolls until your focus ends.
